name: Henry Samueli, Ph.
background: Dr. Samueli has served as Chairman of the Board since 2018. He co-founded Broadcom Corporation in 1991 and served as its Chief Technical Officer and a director until its acquisition by Broadcom Inc. in 2016. He is a Fellow of the IEEE and a member of the National Academy of Engineering.

company_affiliations.name: Broadcom Corporation (Predecessor)
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Chief Technical Officer, Chairman of the Board
